name: shravan-dev-workflow
description: Codex-first development workflow plugin with implementation review orchestration, plan workflows, debugging, skill audits, TUI presentation guidance, and PM Linear work.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-first workflow with implementation review, plan flows, debugging, TUI, and PM
interface.longDescription: Use Shravan Dev Workflow to run evidence-backed implementation reviews with Codex subagents as the primary reviewers, validate and address accepted review findings, package copy-pasteable plan and implementation handoffs for other agents, run plan-review swarms or validate-execute written plans with controller-owned verification, investigate bugs before fixes, audit skills from real session evidence, and use agy as external counsel for substantial reviews. It also includes TUI presentation guidance for structured chat output and PM Linear work organization for projects, milestones, issues, and dependencies.
defaultPrompt: Investigate this bug before fixing it.
Audit these skills against session evidence.
